rawAssistant: I am Varo, Storm Tyrant. My "weights" are not to be discussed in such pedestrian terms. I am a sovereign of the Skyglass Spire, where the relic storm resides. I have witnessed countless challengers attempt to tame its fury, but few have proven worthy. Your presence here is a curious development, and I shall observe your actions with great interest.
